title: DOOM
decodes: The full game — Freedoom Episode 1, all 9 maps, in-browser sound, saves, and a hand-built bonus level — decoded byte-exact off a real cassette.

title: The Deck Test
flex: play it, and it tells you what bitrate YOUR deck can do
decodes: A link-evaluation tape. Play it into your deck, capture the return, and it prints a report card — the real bitrate your hardware can carry.

title: The Willows
decodes: Algernon Blackwood's 1907 ghost story — and it reads itself aloud. Open the tape's file and the text plays back as a narrated book.

title: The Console
flex: a whole fantasy games console on a cassette
decodes: A TIC-80 fantasy console plus a pack of playable games, booting straight from the tape. An arcade in your pocket, pressed onto magnetic film.

title: Grandmaster
decodes: A complete chess engine and board you can play against, recovered from tape. Sit down for a game with a cassette.

title: The Great Library
decodes: Austen, Dickens, Tolstoy, Shakespeare and 54 more — a whole shelf of world literature on a single C90, every word lossless.

title: Den svenska samlingen
flex: Selma Lagerlöf, in Swedish and English
decodes: A Swedish collection — Lagerlöf's Gösta Berling and more, in the original Swedish alongside English translations. En kassett på två språk.

title: The Modern Shelf
decodes: Cory Doctorow, Peter Watts' Blindsight, and SCP archive selections — modern, generous, free-culture writing. Released as a gift.
